text.title: kb-agents-md-context-pyramid Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kb-agents-md-context-pyramid as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding extra prose, links, or directives to `CLAUDE.md` beyond the single `@AGENTS.md` line.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Drift between `CLAUDE.md` and `AGENTS.md` immediately desyncs Claude Code from every other agent; the hook stops being a hook and becomes a second source of truth that nobody updates.

failure-mode.description: Adding `CLAUDE.md` + `AGENTS.md` to every leaf folder regardless of content (including empty `__init__.py`-only dirs).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Doubles maintenance cost without information gain; each pair must be touched on every refactor. The skip rules exist to keep the convention adoptable, not to be ignored.
